subject: Bronzong, a large bronze bell-shaped Pokemon with a prominent central jewel and ringed metallic detailing, floating against a cloudy sky
description: A large bronze-colored bell-shaped Pokemon hovers against a grey-blue cloudy sky. Its body is roughly cylindrical with a flat top, adorned with circular ridged bands and a prominent red jewel at its center. Short arm-like protrusions extend from its sides. The coloring is metallic bronze and teal-green with oxidized detailing, giving it an ancient artifact quality. The creature floats weightlessly, and the surrounding cloud and sky background evokes a deity invoked from ancient times.
foreground: Bronzong floating, bronze bell body with red jewel
